# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security


# CloudFormation template with EC2 instance, EBS volume for application data & IAM roles setup (Phase1) and backup policies in place at phase 2 after validation of architecture(phase3). AWS Secrets Manager is used to store sensitive information. For simplicity's sake we are not storing any secrets here
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09' # Define the version format for CloudFormation template (required) 
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31   # Enable serverless support in CFN. This is required when using SAM or Serverless Application Model(SAM). It allows you to write your application and its resources as code, which can be versioned separately from the rest of your infrastructure
